n: Chapter 16.5: A Reminder of Ancient Days

steps.t: Rahâzi wants to examine the dragon-bones said to lie within the Dry-whelm, west of Ahâba.
Rahâzi stares at the dragon-bones in the Dry-whelm.
Glorfindel is interested in seeing the Dawn-warden statue to the north-west of the Dry-whelm up close.
Glorfindel is at the Dawn-warden statue in Idagâl.
A number of wayfarers have made pilgrimages to the Dawn-warden statue in Idagâl.
A number of wayfarers have made pilgrimages to the Dawn-warden statue in Idagâl.
Kindrígi asked you to defeat the creatures at the Tombs of Khâb Ishil and recover the stones they stole from the site of the Dawn-warden.
Kindrígi is waiting to hear news of your success, and to accept delivery of the sacred stones the kergrim stole from the Dawn-warden site.
